utterances.speaker: Chip
utterances.text: ... and then Zana , just let one rip ! !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Look , not that I enjoy talking about people who I went to high school with , cause I do , but umm , maybe we could talk about something else ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Like you , I do not even know where you work ?
